title: Diputs group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Diputs''''' was a group of two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] discovered that Imperial [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were using the base at [[Kalla VII]] for supplies and repairs on their way to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] proposed that if the base was destroyed, any passing ships heading for the Death Star would be stranded there, leaving them open to capture.

''Diputs'' group arrived at the repair dock while it was being destroyed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]. They were also destroyed by the Rebels.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
